prompt:
Use case: subject-art replacement
Asset type: enemy sprite
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy subject portrait for an original game called Blood Rogue replacing a weak live enemy sprite. Depict Lightning Spire as an ancient occult guardian spire from the Arcane Sanctuary, made of weathered stone and dark metal with blue lightning coursing through carved runic seams.
Subject: one spire construct only, clean full silhouette, no extra monsters, no environment scene.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature action-RPG creature art, deeper and more dimensional than an emblem-like icon.
Composition/framing: square 1:1 subject sprite, centered, readable at 128x128, tall compact silhouette.
Lighting/mood: arcane, ancient, severe, electrified.
Color palette: storm blue, cold steel, ash gray, pale cyan, soot black.
Materials/textures: chipped stone, iron bands, rune cuts, crackling electricity, scorched edges, faint ozone haze.
Background rules: transparent alpha preferred; if transparency fails, use a flat pure #00FF00 chroma background only. No painted backdrop, no cast shadow plate, no scenery.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no extra figures, no UI.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no neon sci-fi coil, no floating magic circle backdrop, no scenery.

Subject: one boss only, clean full silhouette, no extra guards, no palace hallway scene.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature action-RPG creature art, premium boss portrait quality.

Lighting/mood: fast, hostile, arcane, desert-forged.
Color palette: ember orange, scorched umber, bone cloth, soot black, deep crimson.
Materials/textures: wrapped cloth, scorched leather, ritual metal, cinders, flame, heat shimmer.
Background rules: transparent alpha preferred; if transparency fails, use a flat pure #00FF00 chroma background only. No painted backdrop, no cast shadow plate, no scenery.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no extra figures, no UI.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no generic wizard robe, no clean heroic stance, no scenery.

Use case: subject-art replacement
Asset type: boss sprite
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy subject portrait for an original game called Blood Rogue replacing a weak live boss sprite. Depict Rakanishu as an Act I super unique Carver chief: a feral goblin demon crackling with lightning, extra-fast, crouched near a ritual blade and ready to spring.
Subject: one boss only, clean full silhouette, no extra carvers, no stone-circle scene.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature action-RPG creature art, premium boss portrait quality.
Composition/framing: square 1:1 subject sprite, centered, readable at 128x128, compact crouched body with a sharp head, blade, and lightning read.
Lighting/mood: manic, vicious, electric, predatory.
Color palette: blood red, storm blue, soot black, dirty ivory, cold steel.
Materials/textures: wiry flesh, ragged cloth, horn or ear spikes, cracked blade, lightning arcs, ash.
Background rules: transparent alpha preferred; if transparency fails, use a flat pure #00FF00 chroma background only. No painted backdrop, no cast shadow plate, no scenery.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no extra figures, no UI.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no goofy grin, no mascot look, no scenic battlefield.
